profile.name: Gajanan B Hampiholi
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer & CS Student
profile.bio: Computer Science & Business Systems engineering student with hands-on internship experience in Python full-stack development. Passionate about building practical web solutions and eager to contribute to impactful real-world projects.

projects.title: Real-Time Face ID with Greeting & Voice Alert
projects.description: A real-time face identification system featuring spoken greetings and voice alerts on recognition. Uses OpenCV for facial detection and pyttsx3 for text-to-speech output.

projects.title: Smart Farm Security Gateway (SFS)
projects.description: An enterprise-grade Smart Farm Security Gateway built on Kali Linux using Python. Features real-time IoT anomaly detection, automated Nmap risk auditing, and business-focused PDF reporting.

projects.title: Mental Health Support App
projects.description: A compassionate web application providing mental health resources, self-assessment tools, and support content to help users manage their wellbeing.

projects.title: Privacy-Preserving Anomaly Detection
projects.description: A Python-based behavioral anomaly detection API designed with privacy-preserving principles. Analyzes patterns and detects anomalies without exposing sensitive user data.

achievements: Developing full-stack web applications using the FastAPI framework in a professional team environment.
Integrated Python libraries Starlette and Pydantic to build robust, production-quality back-end services.
Contributed to end-to-end project deliverables, gaining practical experience in real-world software development workflows.
Designed and built an AI-powered face recognition security system using OpenCV for automated real-time alerts.
Integrated Telegram Bot API to deliver instant security notifications upon unauthorized access detection.
Improved overall security efficiency by 20% through optimized facial recognition pipelines.

education.degree: B.E. in Computer Science & Business Systems

achievements: Earned recognition for Best Out of Waste competition [2021]
